response: Founded in 1861, MIT holds the #1 university ranking, with a student body of 11,500 and 1,069 faculty members. It is highly selective, boasting a 3.9% acceptance rate and an annual tuition of $57,590. Backed by a $24.6B endowment and counting 98 Nobel laureates among its community, it stands as one of the world’s most prestigious and well-resourced academic institutions.
